final:
module counter_2bit (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg [1:0] count);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
	if (reset) begin
		count <= 2'b00;
	end else begin
		count <= count + 2'b01;
	end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 2'b01;
    end
  end

endmodule
